locator.quote: Commission drift matters once you isolate the term.

text: Commission drift matters once you isolate the term: zero-mean claims are 'zero-mean modulo commission', small enough to hide in a mixed test but enough to blow past 2 SE when isolated.

locator.quote: default 5 % commission and N=1000 trials, the drift is large

text: Running the drawdown term through the full env at default 5% commission and N=1000 trials makes the drift large enough to fail the zero-mean test, so the fixture sets commission=0.0.

locator.quote: Episode log uses 4-decimal rounding — budget for it in

text: The episode log uses 4-decimal rounding, capping |total−(raw+shaped)| at ~1.5e-4; a 1e-6 invariant threshold would fail on rounding, not real bugs — size tolerance to the logging precision.
